9202.Name: Slumberdream Valley (Easy)
9202.Content:
Recommended: [Illusion Strength] 1810
The valley's mysterious power grants additional abilities to different roles:
Guard: When Class Skills deal damage, they inflict an extra instance of fixed damage equal to a percentage of Armor and HP.
Support: When casting non-damaging skills, deals AoE damage to nearby enemies.
Attack: Dream DMG +10%.
To combat the highlands' Illusory Plague, researchers extracted energy from the Illusory Blooms and created an illusion testing ground—Slumberdream Valley. However, illusion power is impossible to fully control, and everything within has become unpredictable.

Artisans forged defensive devices at the entrance, while adventurers ventured deep within to uncover its secrets. Some lost themselves, sinking into the dreamscape forever. This place is both a land of irresistible temptation and a beacon of hope for restoring peace to the highlands.
